case_title: OLIVER FRINGER, et al VS. JOHN WARD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FRINGER, OLIVER AS TO DEFENDANT WARD, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED DEC-16-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WARD, JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: PHILLIP HWEE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRINGER, OLIVER DONALDSON, KRISTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARD, JOHN $3,010.32 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,085.32, (THE REMAINING SECURITY DEPOSIT WITHHELD ($3010.32) MINUS ANY PRORATED DUE, AS PLAINTIFFS' HAVE SHOWN BY A PREPONDERENCE OF EVIDENCE, LEASED FLAT WAS UNINHABITABLE DUE TO MOSQUITO INFESTATION & REFUSAL TO CURE. OTHER TERMS AND ORDERS: PLAINTIFFS' HAVE FAILED TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT LANDLORD KEPT THE REMAINEDER OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IN BAD FAITH. PLAINTIFFS SHALL PAY THE DEFENDANT REASONABLE PRORATED UNPAID RENT , IF ANY.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-108-REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS)FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT WARD, JOHN AS TO PLAINTIFF FRINGER, OLIVER DONALDSON, KRISTA
"ANSWER" ON SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RECEIVED (FROM BOTH PLAINTIFFS)AND FILED.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS DENIED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRINGER, OLIVER DONALDSON, KRISTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARD, JOHN $3,010.32 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,145.32, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW DEFENDANT KEPT THE REMAINING (DISPUTED) SECURITY DEPOSIT IN BAD FAITH UNDER CIVIL CODE 1950.5 (L). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR TRUST TAG 23317 BY DEFENDANT WARD, JOHN
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT WARD, JOHN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WARD, JOHN
JUDGMENT CREDITORS REQUEST FOR FUNDS RECEIVED & FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRINGER, OLIVER DONALDSON, KRISTA AS TO DEFENDANT WARD, JOHN
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $3,145.32 RE 23317 FOR TRANSACTION W0809423D001 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO O. FRINGER & K. DONALDSON, DOC#1902013261, WARRANT #38003020, DATED MAY-20-2009
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
LETTER TO PARTIES - EXHIBITS PRESERVE UNTIL OCT. 16, 2009 AND WILL BE DESTROYED THEREAFTER.
